category_sources: Official project homepage describes genext2fs as an ext2 filesystem generator
source_facts.description says it generates an ext2 filesystem as a non-root user
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the repository documentation surface
Official SourceForge homepage is the project information surface
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/bestouff/genext2fs, so repo is returned as null per instruction
tags_sources: Official homepage notes non-root image creation and embedded-style source usage
